title: Proposal Apply Log Record Schema
description: Schema for capturing individual proposal application audit log records.

applied_at.description: Timestamp when the operations were applied.

target.description: Absolute or relative path to the target workspace root.

files_changed.description: Files modified or created during this execution.

before_hashes.description: SHA-256 hashes of affected files before modifications.

after_hashes.description: SHA-256 hashes of affected files after modifications.

status.description: Execution status of the applied proposal.
